basics.name: Walter Jahir Ambriz Reyna
basics.label: Backend & AI Engineer
basics.summary: Backend & AI Engineer with production experience building systems that connect LLMs, APIs, and live data into reliable, scalable services using Python and FastAPI. I specialize in multiagent orchestration, LLM integration, and automated evaluation pipelines. I've owned backend services from start to finish, handling API design, integrations, deployment, monitoring, and CI/CD. I work well independently in fast paced startups and enjoy turning complex business problems into working technical solutions.

work.name: Backend & AI Engineer
work.summary: Built and owned production backend services with Python and FastAPI, connecting LLM agents to live biometric data and product APIs for a digital health platform serving 400+ users. Developed multiagent orchestration systems and MLflow evaluation pipelines to validate AI responses.

projects.name: AI Powered Interactive Portfolio
projects.description: Interactive portfolio with a retro terminal UI and an integrated LLM assistant (WALTER_AI) that navigates the site and retrieves structured data. Features GPU accelerated visual effects with minimal CPU usage. Built with Angular 21, Tailwind CSS, and FastAPI.

projects.name: WALTER_AI Neural Core
projects.description: Multiagent orchestration engine for AI powered interactions. Built around a master orchestrator that dynamically executes tools to retrieve structured portfolio data. Supports streaming responses via server sent events with execution logs. Follows clean architecture principles. Built with FastAPI and Llama 3.1.
